title: Honesty-triad cross-repo dashboard refresh ω-cycle
origin_context: After 24h+ of activity (nexus 246 commits / anima 146 / hexa-lang 41 / n6-arch 29) post the absorption-refresh ω-cycle, validate dashboard reading still matches reality.

axes.delta_vs_prior: atlas lines/facts unchanged; nexus last_commit advanced 059b8438 → d84a0601 (2026-04-25 22:36 → 2026-04-26 01:09)

axes.result: Dashboard PASS counts (5/5, 5/5, 5/5, 4/5) MATCH direct verification.

drift_findings.cause: anima n6/atlas.n6 is a symlink to ~/core/canon/atlas/atlas.n6; git log -- n6/atlas.n6 inside anima returns empty
drift_findings.suggested_fix: deref symlink before git log in dashboard tool

drift_findings.cause: checks .git/HEAD existence only, not git-ls-files of SSOT
drift_findings.impact: all 4 repos happen to pass direct ls-files this cycle, no false-positive observed

axes.result: OPT-A ceiling holds. hexa-lang remains 4/5 PARTIAL by architectural decision.

axes.alignment_opportunity: Each repo expresses defense differently (tool/state/doc). Optional 6th precondition (f) 'defense surface declared' would normalize the signal.

fixpoint.next_action: no immediate change required; latent (a) tightening + symlink display fix queued as Tier-2
